hook.summary: A magical chest is tapped to reveal free gifts.
hook.visual_action: Text overlay flashes 'FREE GIFTS', then a hand taps a glowing chest in a fantasy forest.
hook.text_overlay: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!

scene_flow: Intro text 'FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!' flashes over a blue forest background.
A hand taps a glowing purple and blue treasure chest sitting on a leaf.
The chest opens, and magical items fly out towards the viewer with a bright flash.
A collection grid of plants and creatures appears with 'Play & Win' and 'Collect Them All!'.
on_screen_text: FREE GIFTS are waiting for you!
audience_proxy: Casual players who enjoy collecting cute creatures and fantasy-themed progression.
